list_info.科目英文名: Practical Software Operation and AI Applications

detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	114學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 實務軟體操作與AI應用 (Practical Software Operation and AI Applications)	開課班級 : 華文一	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 李瑄	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
1. Students will develop the ability to effectively use AI to support learning, analysis, and work enhancement.學生有妥善使用AI協助學習、分析及促進工作之能力 2. Students will possess advanced skills in using office productivity software (e.g., Word, Excel).學生有使用辦公室文書處理軟體（例如：Word、Excel）的進階能力 3. Students will develop the ability to design and conduct questionnaire surveys and analyze the results.學生有設計問卷調查及分析之能力 4. Students will possess the ability to analyze academic data.學生有學術資料分析之能力 


2.教學綱要
This course is an EMI (English as a Medium of Instruction) course and will be taught using commonly used English terms related to AI functions and software. The course is divided into three main parts:
(1) This course trains students to collaborate with AI, enabling them to effectively use AI tools for learning, creation, and analysis.
(2) This course teaches students advanced formatting in Microsoft Word, allowing them to produce documents that meet academic paper standards.
(3) This course helps students develop the ability to conduct questionnaire surveys and perform descriptive statistical analysis using Excel and Google Forms, with the assistance of AI for data analysis.
本課程為EMI課程，將使用常用英文進行常用AI功能及進階文書軟體教學。課程主要分為三部份：（一）本課程教導學生與AI共作之能力，能適切使用AI工具進行學習、創作及分析。（二）本課程教導學生進階word格式設定，能編排出符合學術論文要求之文件格式。（三）本課程協助學生有使用excel、google表單進行問卷調查及描述統計分析能力，並能使用AI協助分析。

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Attendance: 10% 出席：10% Class Assignments: 20% 課堂作業：20%（每次上課均有當堂課需完成之作業） Midterm Project (Picture Book Production and Presentation): 20% 期中專題（繪本製作與發表）：20% Midterm Exam (Word): 25% 期中考（Word）：25% Final Exam (Excel): 25% 期末考（Excel）：25% 
Please submit assignments on time through the digital platform. 請按時將作業繳交至數位平台。 
Midterm Project: Collaborate with AI to design and create a picture book themed around Kinmen. 期中專題：以金門為主題，與AI共作設計與製作繪本。 


8.永續發展目標(SDGs)：SDG4 優質教育、SDG14 保育海洋生態


9.大學社會責任(USR)關聯性：高
